subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out. We’d be open to an introductory call and can offer the following windows: 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, and 2026-04-23, each from 14:00–16:00 UTC. Please let me know which slot works best for you.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines, I’m not able to share internal contact information. For general company information, please refer to our public website.

Best,
[Your Name]
